# Mario Marcolongo — Full Technical & Research Dossier

## Executive Summary
Mario Marcolongo is an independent researcher, applied engineer, and open-knowledge builder. His work specializes in compressing complex scientific literature—across genetics, epidemiology, toxicology, and public policy—into verifiable visual artifacts and production software tools.

## Core Methodology & Capabilities
- **Structured Evidence Synthesis**: Extracting primary data from peer-reviewed literature and government archives into rigorous visual comparisons and open datasets.
- **Applied Genomics Pipeline**: WGS (41× depth) processing via Terra.bio, ancestry-standardized polygenic risk scoring (pgsc_calc / Nextflow against 1000 Genomes + HGDP), ClinVar clinical variant screening, and VEP-annotated pharmacogenomic panel extraction.
- **Production Web & AI Engineering**: Serverless architecture (AWS Lambda, GitHub Actions CI/CD), Manifest V3 browser extension development, semantic web engineering, and AI-native structured output design.

## Featured Works & Verified Independent Reuse
1. **Overlapping Phenotypes in Monogenic Brain Disorders (Euler Diagram)**
   - Mapped gene associations across autism, epilepsy, dystonia, and schizophrenia.
   - Independently adopted into English, French, Polish, and Romanian Wikipedia articles.
   - Reproduced in *Autism Research between Psychology and Neuroscience* (Palgrave Macmillan, 2024).
2. **Benzo(a)pyrene in Processed Yerba Maté (Toxicology Meta-Comparison)**
   - Synthesized contamination levels across 8 commercial brands and 3 sampling years from independent toxicology studies.
3. **National Stances on Vegetarian Diets (Global Policy Matrix)**
   - Categorized official dietary guidelines across national and subnational governments worldwide.
4. **Yourself to Science (yourselftoscience.org)**
   - Open, centralized catalogue for citizen biological sample and data donation to research. CC0 dataset, AGPL-3 codebase.

## Contact & Career Objectives
- Open to high-impact opportunities in the United States and internationally.
- Interests: Applied AI, scientific tooling, research engineering, open-source biomedical infrastructure, and technical leadership.
- Contact via LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mario-marcolongo
